compositional_truth_check.p1_yellow_pot: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter; soil appears dormant/barren.
compositional_truth_check.p2_black_pot: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter; soil appears dormant/barren.
compositional_truth_check.p3_black_pot: Present: Pothos specimen (single leaf) + White Rabbit anchor.
compositional_truth_check.p4_silver_guest: Not detected: No distinct silver guest specimen identified in the shared black pot space.

inventory_reconciliation.notes: Registry mismatch. Only P3 remains active. P1, P2, and P4 are currently showing no viable vegetative growth.

plant_audit.p3: Single leaf remaining, appears stable but isolated.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and moist across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments present in P3/P4 area, acting as a potential calcium amendment or mulch.
biome_observations.anomalies: Presence of white, cable-like structures (likely charging cables or irrigation tubing) encroaching on the P1/P2 space.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_current: The P3 specimen has maintained its single-leaf posture. The surrounding pots (P1, P2) have remained devoid of visible foliage throughout the 5-day observation window.

visual_health_inference.p3: Stable, but high risk due to lack of supporting foliage.
visual_health_inference.p1_p2_p4: Presumed dormant or failed. No photosynthetic activity detected.

anomalies: External cable/wire interference in the upper right quadrant of the frame.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is in a state of extreme stasis. Only one Pothos leaf remains in the P3 pot, anchored by the rabbit figurine. The other pots (P1, P2) are currently barren, suggesting either a total loss of the original specimens or a dormant phase. The environment is dark, and the presence of eggshells suggests an attempt at soil enrichment, though no new growth has been triggered by this intervention.
